name: Voter ID Card
description: The Electors Photo Identity Card (EPIC) issued by the Election Commission of India, serving as identity proof and allowing citizens to vote.
application_steps: Visit the official Voters' Services Portal.
Register and login to the portal.
Select 'Fill Form 6' for new voter registration.
Fill out the form completely with personal and family details.
Upload scanned copies of age proof, address proof, and a passport-size photograph.
Submit the form and save the reference number.
A Booth Level Officer (BLO) may visit your address for verification.
Once approved, the EPIC is delivered by post.

required_documents.name: Proof of Age
required_documents.purpose: To verify the applicant is 18 years or older.
required_documents.where_to_get: Birth Certificate, Class 10/12 Marksheet, PAN Card, Aadhaar

required_documents.name: Proof of Residence
required_documents.purpose: To allocate the correct polling constituency.
required_documents.where_to_get: Utility Bill, Bank Passbook, Rent Agreement, Passport

common_mistakes: Providing an old address proof where the applicant no longer resides.
Uploading a blurry or non-standard photograph.
Not coordinating with the BLO during the verification visit.
